---
title: "Code snippets"
description: "Code snippets in R, Python and Stata. Updated once in a while."
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
date: 06-03-2025
#categories: [R, course] 

listing:
  contents: snippets
  fields: [title]
  type: table 
  categories: false
  filter-ui: false

draft: false
---


------------------------------------------------------------------------
